failures.description: The agent invoked ProductCatalogSearch with invalid arguments: product_id was 0 instead of the provided string "1808611083", and item_id "1096508426" was omitted.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal matched the user request: use ProductCatalogSearch to determine whether item 1096508426 of product 1808611083 has difficulty level beginner. However, at index 2 the agent formed an ill-typed and incomplete tool invocation: it used {"product_id": 0}, omitting the required item_id and using an integer instead of the required string product_id. The tool then explicitly returned a SchemaError at index 3. This is a malformed tool call, not a misunderstanding of the user goal or a connectivity/access issue.
